title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 3.
content:
There was an Old Man with a nose,
    Who said, "If you choose to suppose,
    That my nose is too long,
    You are certainly wrong!"
    That remarkable Man with a nose.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 3." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
